title: Date range filtering not exposed via MCP tool
evidence: src/br_soccer/query.clj:37 matches-in-date-range exists but src/br_soccer/mcp.clj search_matches inputSchema (lines 11-16) only exposes season, not from/to date range parameters
suggestion: Add from_date and to_date parameters to the search_matches MCP tool schema and wire them to q/matches-in-date-range

title: search_matches returns empty list when no filter criteria given
evidence: src/br_soccer/mcp.clj:71 cond falls through to :else [] when no team/season/competition is supplied
suggestion: Default to returning recent matches with limit when no filters are given
